title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex CASE statement
poc: SELECT ALL CASE WHEN NOT NULL NOT IN ( - COALESCE ( + - CAST ( + 45 AS INTEGER ), - 66, - 9 * COALESCE ( 80, NULLIF ( - 12, + + ( + 26 ) + - - MAX ( 18 ) + 66 + 98 ) + + + AVG ( ALL 35 ), - - 55 - - - 67, + 42 ) ), + COUNT ( * ) * - + 23, + 66 * + 93 + - ( - 61 ) + + 10 * + 92 * + - 40 * - 47 / 29, COUNT ( * ) * 30 / 28 + 73 ) THEN COUNT ( * ) / - - 86 ELSE NULL END - - 66;
key_bug_features: Complex CASE statement with nested functions and NULL handling
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value1 INTEGER, value2 INTEGER, value3 INTEGER DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (value1, value2) VALUES (NULL, 10), (20, NULL), (30, 40);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_table(id), score FLOAT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, score) VALUES (1, 95.5), (2, NULL), (3, 88.0);
SELECT CASE WHEN value1 IS NULL THEN (SELECT AVG(score) FROM another_table WHERE ref_id = test_table.id) ELSE value1 END AS result FROM test_table;
